title: Integrate TimeLine

posts.author: jive2225 (Scott Berg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like the TimeLine to sync to Outlook. The Outlook Calendar integration email tutorial states one of 2 sync configuration options is to click the 3 buttons on the TimeLine column (the other of course is on the date column). If the calendar sync instructions/tutorial tell a user to do this on the Timeline tab, then I would think Timeline would integration to Outlook calendar.

This would be super helpful.
